title: bucco cerefolium
intro: Bucco cerefolium, also known as European pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its carminative and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve digestive issues and menstrual cramps. European pennyroyal has been traditionally used to aid in reducing anxiety and stress, promote better sleep, and support overall women's health. Herbal preparations of bucco cerefolium can be found in teas, essential oils, and capsules, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
